title: Umaya Tri-Fold Menu Refresh — Food Photography Prep, Brand-Cohesive Color Grade, Logo Vectorization & Source Export
one_line_ask: Prep, color-grade, cut out, crop, and print-export the new dish photography, the vectorized logo, the textured background, and the existing Illustrator menu source for Umaya's tri-fold menu refresh, all matched to the dark/red Japanese brand look and ready for the designer to place.

issues: Depth of field is slightly shallower than a typical 50mm at moderate aperture — far bowl rim falls soft, though acceptable for brief
Chili oil swirl reads more as a smear/drizzle than a clean swirl pattern — minor plating imperfection within brief tolerance
Nori sheet angle is very upright/prominent, slightly dominating composition, though not a disqualifying issue
Steam wisps are subtle and partially lost against the dark background — still readable but could be more defined
White balance appears neutral-to-slightly-warm rather than the specified cool/neutral, limiting grading headroom slightly
Tilt appears minimal/nearly level rather than the specified ~4 degrees off-level, which may reduce the justification for the auto_straighten step
Tare sauce brushstroke is present but partially obscured under egg rather than a clean distinct brushstroke
Depth of field is moderate but background blur could be slightly shallower for stronger hero separation
Stray sesame seeds on table surface are very sparse/barely visible
Slight luminance variation in lower-center area with faint warm/golden mineral deposit — acceptable natural characteristic but designer should neutralise if needed
Right-side veining is more pronounced and raised/textured than left side, creating minor asymmetry — within acceptable natural slate variation
Overall image is very slightly darker in corners (natural vignette) — minor, easily corrected
Logo is presented on a paper with a shadow and wood background, not a transparent background as required (but acceptable as a client source input).
Slight paper texture and shadow present, but this is not penalized per brief since it's a source asset.
Red accent color appears correct but should be checked for exact match (#C8302A) during vectorization.
Background is off-white paper texture with visible wrinkles and wood surface beneath — not a transparent background as specified; designer will need to isolate
Slight shadow cast on lower-right of paper card adds photographic quality inconsistent with a flat logo asset
Steam wisps above bowl are somewhat loose/brushstroke-ambiguous — could be interpreted as a figure or flame rather than a clean Japanese-style steam mark; vectorization may require cleanup
Red color appears slightly darker/more muted than #C8302A in the photographed rendering — color correction needed
Paper texture and ambient lighting give a slight photographic feel rather than a pure flat raster export, though this is within acceptable source-asset tolerance
Logo is rendered on a card/paper prop rather than isolated, adding unnecessary compositing work for the designer

assets.name: umaya_menu_existing.ai
assets.note: Client-provided .ai template; represented here as an authored text proxy (binary Adobe format not synthesizable).
